# Q 

2 

WAX

## Exterior / coating

### The first GYEON wax!

Q² Wax: the most traditional type of car care product that meets sophisticated technology and innovative packaging.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/productmain_1700x1645px_q2wax_set_2021-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Durable and easy to apply wax!

It is a perfect stand-alone product for DIY users and enthusiasts. Still, detailing professionals is an entry-level protection product and a great top-up to one of our ceramic coatings.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons68.svg)

SELF-CLEANING PROPERTIES 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons79.svg)

PREVENTS UV DAMAGE 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons23.svg)

GUARDS AGAINST THE ELEMENTS 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons81.svg)

WATER REPELLENT 

what makes

Q2 WAX so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/1d3a7868-683x1024.jpg)

We used our know-how and expertise in coating formulations to create an unconventional wax. Q² Wax’s formula includes fluorine. Like the legendary Q² Booster, a highly reactive topcoat, it guarantees excellent performance, enormous beading, and extraordinary gloss.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/gq-2-of-170-683x1024.jpg)

Q² Wax is a highly glossy wax with outstanding hydrophobic properties for any colour. Its standout feature is its effortless application and wipe-off, making it an absolute pleasure.

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2wax.webp)

CAPACITIES 

175GR

BOX CONTAINS 

Q² WAX / MICROFIBER TOWEL / WAX APPLICATOR 

Gloss 

Beading 

Color Enhancement 

Real World Lifespan

up to 6 months / 3kkm

PH Tolerance

4-9

Consumption

15gr/car

COMPARE coatings

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

WAX

01
Prepare the surface by washing, decontaminating, and degreasing with Q²M Prep. 

02
Apply a light and uniform layer over dry paintwork 

03
Leave it to cure for a minimum of 30 minutes before wipe-off 

04
We recommend using Q²M PolishWipe EVO for that job 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
How long will it last? 

Q² Wax lasts up to 3/6 months.

02
Can I apply multiple layers? 

Yes

03
Can it be applied on a wet surface ? 

No, only on well prepared, decontaminated and degreased with Q²M Prep surfaces or on top of another ceramic coating.

04
Can I use it as a top coat to another coating? 

Yes, it can be applied as a top coat to any high-quality ceramic coating. Make sure the coating underneath is dry and had time to cure.

05
Will it prevent water marks or bird droppings damaging paint ? 

Nothing can entirely prevent water marks. They can happen on bare, waxed and coated paint as well. Bird residue is one of the harshest and most damaging substance known. A coating will provide you with the time necessary to remove the contamination without etching. However, once you leave it on a hot summer day for many hours, not even a coating will prevent damage entirely.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360004441017-Q-Wax)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
